data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. PA KETTLE ran below best last time finishing eighth (19.48) over 330m at Temora from Box 7. Goes very well from this draw with two wins and two minor placings from five starts. Better than last start and worth following up. 8. MOM'S SPAGHETTI was responsible for a modest effort most recently when fifth at Temora over 330m behind Dana Mac (19.77) in a Grade 5. Should be about the mark. 2. BILLIE GIRL will be hard to beat with a drop in journey.","runners":[1,8,2],"exclusive":false}
